message:
fix(core): TOON encoder deadlock prevention, reservation race fix, and storage lock simplification

- toon.rs: refactor stdin write to run in a spawned thread to avoid blocking
  the main process; sequential write_all() could deadlock when the child
  process's stdout buffer fills before stdin is consumed; now writes
  concurrently and joins thread after wait_with_output()
- reservations.rs: add double-check in force_release_file_reservation() to
  prevent releasing reservations that were renewed by another agent between
  the staleness calculation and the release call; prevents race condition
  where a still-valid reservation could be incorrectly released
- storage/lib.rs: simplify commit_lock_path() to always return global
  .commit.lock path, removing complex project-scoped path logic that was
  dead code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
